name: Dragunity Knight - Trident
name_jp: ドラグニティナイト－トライデント
desc:
1 Dragon Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner Winged Beast monsters
Once per turn: You can send up to 3 cards you control to the GY; look at your opponent's Extra Deck, and if you do, send an equal number of cards from there to the GY.
mnst_eff:
1 Dragon Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner Winged Beast monsters
Once per turn: You can send up to 3 cards you control to the GY; look at your opponent's Extra Deck, and if you do, send an equal number of cards from there to the GY.
eff:
1 Dragon Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner Winged Beast monsters
Once per turn: You can send up to 3 cards you control to the GY; look at your opponent's Extra Deck, and if you do, send an equal number of cards from there to the GY.

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
Sends from your opponent's Extra Deck to your opponent's Graveyard
summoning: Requires Type specific Tuner Synchro Materials
Requires Type specific non-Tuner Synchro Materials
